citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany the APHIS Official during the inspection process at 11:15am on
2/3/2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by knocking on the door, but there was no answer. The
inspector then called number on file and left message. The licensee texted back that they were at work. Failure to provide
access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to
provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b)  Repeat
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany the APHIS Official during the inspection process at 11:15am on 
2/3/2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by knocking on the door, but there was no answer. The 
inspector then called number on file and left message. The licensee texted back that they were at work. Failure to provide 
access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to 
provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
